exit_codes.0: no findings at selected fail threshold, or --fail-on none
exit_codes.1: findings met selected fail threshold or migration command failed

recommended_commands.purpose: Generate a baseline save fixture from a schema

recommended_commands.command: godot-save-guard migrate-chain <fixtures> --chain migrations.toml --output-dir migrated --dry-run --format json --output migration-chain.json

recommended_commands.purpose: Run a migration chain, validate the final saves, and compare before/after shape
recommended_commands.command: godot-save-guard migrate-chain <fixtures> --chain migrations.toml --output-dir migrated --schema <schema.json> --compare-original --format json --output migration-chain.json

recommended_commands.purpose: Verify supported save versions can reach the current format
Write sanitized save fixture copies for sharing or CI artifacts
